CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Set For Trial On Feb-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ANURADHA REDDY, PRAVEEN REDDY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Defendants Anuradha and Praveen Reddy's motion to strike the punitive damages allegations in the complaint is granted. Plaintiffs Kristen and Timothy Pearce filed a notice of non-opposition to this motion.

Counsel for defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
